title: Manager heartbeat item (GET /heartbeats)
description: One MANAGER's heartbeat snapshot. Rows ARE manager heartbeats — one row per manager process; the 1 manager : 1 box : N agents grouping is by `host`. As-built source of truth: heartbeat v2 (apps/manager/docs/contracts/schemas/session-state.schema.json $defs/heartbeat, channel_lock per $defs/channelLock), rewritten every supervisor tick and bridged by console-api. Legacy writers that emit `schema: 1` are normalized server-side to this v2 shape. Epoch-seconds timestamps are retained from the as-built shape (`*_epoch`; 0 = never). `host` and `observed_at` are added by the aggregation, not written by the manager. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

schema_version.description: Heartbeat contract version (v2 = fleet-standard `schema_version` key; legacy `schema: 1` writers normalized server-side).

handle.description: Fleet handle of the SUPERVISED agent (the row is the manager's; this names who it manages). null for pre-v2 heartbeats that omit it.

pid.description: Manager process id (valid on Windows too).

session_id.description: The supervised Claude Code session id.

tmux_session.description: tmux session holding the agent pane; null on platforms without tmux. Consumers MUST NOT require it.

pane_id.description: Owned (tagged) tmux pane id, e.g. '%12'; null when no live pane or non-tmux platform.

io_ok.description: false = the manager owns/monitors a pane but won't inject keys into it.

started_at_epoch.description: Epoch seconds the agent was spawned/adopted; 0 = never.

last_sync_ok_epoch.description: Epoch seconds of the last successful Matrix /sync; 0 = never.

updated_at_epoch.description: Epoch seconds this snapshot was written; the freshness gate.

state.description: held = this manager owns the Matrix channel; released = cleanly gave it up; lockout = another owner detected, stood down.

owner.description: Identity currently believed to hold the channel; null when unknown.

acquired_at_epoch.description: Epoch seconds the lock was taken; 0/null = unknown.

contender.description: When state=lockout: the identity observed squatting the channel.

channel_lock.description: Single-owner Matrix channel lock state (session-state.schema.json $defs/channelLock); null when the (legacy) writer reported none.

host.description: Machine label in canonical form ('.N' for lab dot-hosts). Added by console-api aggregation — the manager's own file does not carry it.

observed_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — when the bridge observed this heartbeat file (per-row freshness). Added by aggregation.

rate_limit_reset_epoch.description: When rate_limited/waiting lifts (from the manager's rate-limit hook resetAt); null = unknown, render 'waiting'.
